mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects ( title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, feature_image_urls, feature_image_captions, project_url, start_date, end_date, use_yn, tech_stack, my_role, trouble_shooting, github_url, deploy_url, result, display_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{featureImageUrls}, #{featureImageCaptions}, #{projectUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{useYn}, #{techStack}, #{myRole}, #{troubleShooting}, #{githubUrl}, #{deployUrl}, #{result}, #{displayOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, feature_image_urls, feature_image_captions, project_url, start_date, end_date, use_yn, tech_stack, my_role, trouble_shooting, github_url, deploy_url, result, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM projects WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, title, summary, description, thumbnail_url, feature_image_urls, feature_image_captions, project_url, start_date, end_date, use_yn, tech_stack, my_role, trouble_shooting, github_url, deploy_url, result, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM projects ORDER BY display_order ASC, id DESC
SELECT id, title, summary, thumbnail_url, project_url, start_date, end_date, use_yn, github_url, deploy_url, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM projects ORDER BY display_order ASC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, feature_image_urls = #{featureImageUrls}, feature_image_captions = #{featureImageCaptions}, project_url = #{projectUrl}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, use_yn = #{useYn}, tech_stack = #{techStack}, my_role = #{myRole}, trouble_shooting = #{troubleShooting}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, deploy_url = #{deployUrl}, result = #{result}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE projects SET display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
